title: PerceptionISP 목적·현재 진행상황·다음 단계
executive_conclusion: PerceptionISP는 sensor-aware software reference와 evidence pipeline으로서는 완성도가 높은 단계다. 다만 production ISP 또는 HumanISP 대비 일반 성능 우월성을 주장할 단계는 아니며, 다음 핵심은 native multi-exposure RAW·실센서 calibration·공정한 multi-seed task benchmark·temporal registration이다.

native_raw.boundary: This proves large held-out native RAW provenance only for the CFA pattern represented by the report. It does not prove all-CFA coverage, real adverse RAW coverage, broad detector superiority, or trained RGB+Aux DNN improvement.

dense_aux_ablation.boundary: This proves input dependence for the compact dense detector under this held-out split. It is not yet a production-detector proof or a broad adverse-condition benchmark.

yolo_seed2.interpretation: Aux path improves recall but loses AP50-95; this is a signal path, not broad superiority.

milestones.completed: RawFrame, exposure axis, CFA and origin validation, native/pseudo contradiction rejection.
milestones.remaining: Unknown origin과 계산 validity 분리, sensor-specific importer, per-channel level과 profile registry.

milestones.completed: Human/machine RGB, accurate/fast paths, health, 33 Aux maps, opt-in trace.
milestones.remaining: Measured latency, fixed-point mapping, closed-loop controller.

milestones.completed: Stateful delayed AE, same-scene AE bracket, AEB sequence, readback and seed audit.
milestones.remaining: Clean committed integration baseline and calibrated temporal noise behavior.

milestones.completed: 6-frame CAM_FRONT chain, pose/intrinsic propagation, 11-result/363-map fresh evidence bundle.
milestones.remaining: No native source exposure metadata; no geometric registration.

milestones.completed: Unregistered dynamic stack and same-frame comparator expose ghost/flicker risk.
milestones.remaining: Registration, deghosting and native RAW before HDR-quality claims.

milestones.completed: Strict NPZ+JSON contract and provenance contradiction checks.
milestones.remaining: Representative real multi-exposure sensor data and radiometric quality benchmark.

milestones.completed: Compact DNN, YOLO gated fusion, distillation, corrected optimizer/freeze path.
milestones.remaining: Genuinely independent multi-seed win and adverse-condition generalization.

milestones.completed: Matched metrics, hard slices, claim gates, counterexamples, tabbed evidence reports.
milestones.remaining: Automated report-size optimization and CI-published acceptance summary.
Throughput, memory, power, fixed point, safety, on-device integration.

roadmap.why: 현재 PerceptionISP와 CameraE2E 모두 미커밋 변경을 포함해 재현 기준점이 불안정합니다.
roadmap.acceptance: 변경 review·commit, clean checkout, Python 3.11 core/3.12 CameraE2E CI, full tests와 scene-0061 smoke 재통과.

roadmap.why: 16채널 extended CHW tensor를 feature-distillation loader가 HWC로 오해할 수 있고, same-camera temporal state·MTF finite/range가 내부에서 강제되지 않습니다.
roadmap.acceptance: layout을 tensor contract로 명시하고 16×H×W/H×W×16 fixture 모두 통과; PreviousFrameState camera/timestamp validation; MTF/PSF finite/range rejection 또는 명시적 clamp; regression test 추가.

roadmap.why: 현재 any/max input saturation은 복구된 HDR 픽셀도 억제하고 noise variance는 exposure weight별 분산을 전파하지 않습니다.
roadmap.acceptance: source-plane risk와 fused recoverability를 별도 map/semantic으로 분리; Σw²V 기반 fusion variance와 exposure별 dark-current를 synthetic radiance truth 및 native bracket에서 검증.

roadmap.why: Origin이 unknown인 기본 수치와 실측 calibration을 구분하지 않으면 물리 Aux map을 과도하게 해석할 수 있습니다.
roadmap.acceptance: 33개 map 각각 valid/calibrated/heuristic/not-applicable 상태와 required origins 제공; unknown fixture의 radiance/noise/HDR-quality claim 차단; measured fixture 통과.

roadmap.why: 현재 nuScenes path는 pseudo-RAW이므로 HDR 화질·radiance claim을 만들 수 없습니다.
roadmap.acceptance: 정적·동적 장면 E×H×W, 노출/gain/CFA/black-white/calibration source attestation, loader round-trip, pseudo/native contradiction 0건.
roadmap.depends_on: 센서 또는 공개 native HDR dataset

roadmap.why: noise/MTF/PSF/lens/color confidence가 neutral default가 아닌 물리적 의미를 가져야 합니다.
roadmap.acceptance: black/white, noise, WB/CCM, lens shading, defect, MTF/PSF를 versioned profile로 저장하고 모든 field origin을 source/readback으로 감사.

roadmap.why: 현재 성능 결과는 positive signal과 counterexample이 혼재합니다.
roadmap.acceptance: 동일 split/model/epoch/augmentation/운영점, 실제 stochastic source가 다른 3+ seeds, bootstrap CI, FP/sample·AP50/75·APs/m/l·boundary F1, counterexample 포함.

roadmap.why: 인접-frame 근사를 HDR 결과로 사용하려면 motion/ego pose 보정이 필요합니다.
roadmap.acceptance: pose warp + optical flow residual + occlusion mask, registered/unregistered comparator, moving-edge ghost metric와 radiance error 개선.
roadmap.depends_on: HDR-quality 목표 선택, native 또는 calibrated sequence

roadmap.why: 33개 전체는 연구에는 유용하지만 모델 입력·대역폭·설명 가능성 측면에서 과합니다.
roadmap.acceptance: core6/edge/HDR/temporal profile 정의, one-group-at-a-time ablation, 성능·latency·memory Pareto, stale/unused map 제거 기준.

roadmap.why: 현재 showcase는 1.1GB이며 float64 reference는 제품 배포에 비효율적입니다.
roadmap.acceptance: float32 equivalence tolerance, compressed/chunked arrays, duplicate preview 제거, peak RAM·wall latency 측정, report size 목표 설정.

roadmap.why: 현재는 설정 제안만 하고 다음 capture/ISP에 자동 적용하지 않습니다.
roadmap.acceptance: bounded state transition, hysteresis, oscillation test, exposure/flicker scenario convergence, audit log.

roadmap.why: Software reference와 automotive/robotics ISP는 throughput·power·safety 요구가 다릅니다.
roadmap.acceptance: fixed-point error budget, target SoC prototype, FPS/latency/power/memory 측정, deterministic failure handling.
